description_long: This is a sleek, military-style jet airplane with a long, pointed nose and a narrow fuselage. The aircraft features a distinctive yellow and gray camouflage paint scheme, with U.S. Air Force insignia visible on the wings and fuselage. Its wings are short, straight, and mounted low on the body, with prominent fuel tanks or pods at the tips. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer mounted high, forming a T-tail configuration. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy. Retractable tricycle landing gear is visible beneath the fuselage and wings.
description: A streamlined military jet with yellow and gray camouflage, low-mounted straight wings, and a T-tail. Features an enclosed forward cockpit and retractable tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the narrow fuselage, low-mounted straight wings with tip pods, and the T-tail configuration.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the long pointed nose, cockpit canopy, landing gear, and the full length of the fuselage and tail.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view displaying the undercarriage, landing gear, and the underside of the wings and fuselage.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to view 1, showing the opposite side's details, including the landing gear and tail structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with tip pods, no visible winglets, minimal dihedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with one nose gear and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
